% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for per_user_mean_sinr_boxplot
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={Per-user mean SINR [dB]},
    ylabel={Deployment Strategy},
    grid=major,
    xtick={1,2,3,4,5},
    xticklabels={{Central massive MIMO},{Distributed fixed},{Distributed movable (Opt. 1)},{Distributed movable (Opt. 2)},{Distributed movable (Opt. 3)}},
    xticklabel style={rotate=15,anchor=east},
    xmin=0,
  ]
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw position=1, draw=CentralMassiveMimoColor, fill=CentralMassiveMimoColor!35] table[y=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_central_massive_mimo.csv};
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw position=2, draw=DistributedFixedColor, fill=DistributedFixedColor!35] table[y=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_fixed.csv};
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw position=3, draw=DistributedMovableColor, fill=DistributedMovableColor!35] table[y=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw position=4, draw=DistributedMovableColor, fill=DistributedMovableColor!35] table[y=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addplot[boxplot, boxplot/draw position=5, draw=DistributedMovableColor, fill=DistributedMovableColor!35] table[y=mean_sinr_db,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/per_user_mean_sinr_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
